sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif pragmatique + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-format comprehension), then self-audited before commit. Covers les adverbes en -ment (fem+ment, -i/-é/-u, -ent→-emment, -ant→-amment, placement in compound tenses) and le subjonctif dans les relatives (desire/need, superlative/restriction, negation). Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ 3 (Hachette), Dossier 6 'Je me cultive' (donner ses impressions; les adverbes de manière; le subjonctif dans les relatives; thème: avis de visiteurs, choisir un spectacle). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
